title: Capstone 03 — Real-Time Voice Assistant (ASR to LLM to TTS)

questions.question: Why can a voice agent not be built by stitching three blocking REST calls?
options: REST endpoints have a 30-second hard timeout
REST is incompatible with WebRTC
JSON serialization is too slow for audio data
End-to-end latency below 800ms requires pipelined streaming at every stage
questions.question_zh: 为什么不能简单串接三个阻塞的 REST 调用来做语音 agent?
options_zh: REST 接口有 30 秒的硬超时
REST 与 WebRTC 不兼容
JSON 序列化对音频数据来说太慢
要把端到端延迟做到 800ms 以下,需要在每一阶段都做 pipeline 化的流式处理

questions.question: What is the role of the turn-detector alongside VAD?
options: Trains a custom voice clone for the agent
Reads partial transcripts and scores whether the user has actually finished their utterance
Detects which speaker is talking in a multi-party call
Mixes background music into the output stream
questions.question_zh: turn-detector 在 VAD 旁边的作用是什么?
options_zh: 为 agent 训练定制语音克隆
读取部分转写内容,判断用户是否真的说完了一段话
在多人通话中检测是哪位说话人
把背景音乐混入输出流

questions.question: When the user starts speaking while the agent is mid-response, what must happen for barge-in to feel right?
options: The TTS finishes the current sentence before yielding
The pipeline buffers user audio until TTS completes
The TTS is canceled immediately, remaining LLM output is dropped, and ASR re-arms
The agent raises the TTS volume to assert priority
questions.question_zh: 用户在 agent 还在回应时开始说话,要让 barge-in 体验自然,必须发生什么?
options_zh: TTS 把当前句子说完再让步
Pipeline 缓冲用户音频,直到 TTS 完成
立即取消 TTS、丢弃剩余 LLM 输出,并让 ASR 重新就绪
agent 提高 TTS 音量来强调优先级

questions.question: Why is a short filler such as "one second, let me check" emitted when a tool exceeds about 300ms?
options: It avoids silence so the conversation does not stall while the side-channel tool runs
It triggers a fallback ASR model
It resets the WebRTC jitter buffer
It improves WER on the next utterance
questions.question_zh: 为什么当工具耗时超过约 300ms 时要发出像「one second, let me check」这样的简短填充语?
options_zh: 避免冷场,使会话不会因为侧通道工具运行而停顿
触发一个备用 ASR 模型
重置 WebRTC jitter buffer
改善下一次发言的 WER

questions.question: The first audio chunk must leave the server within roughly how long of the first LLM token?
options: 20ms
800ms
2 seconds
200ms
questions.question_zh: 第一段音频块必须在第一个 LLM token 之后大约多久离开服务器?
options_zh: 20ms
800ms
2 秒
200ms

questions.question: Which metric directly measures inappropriate barge-in or over-eager turn closure?
options: WER
MOS
Acceptance rate
False-cutoff rate
questions.question_zh: 哪个指标直接衡量不当的 barge-in 或过度激进的轮次结束判断?
options_zh: WER
MOS
Acceptance rate
False-cutoff rate

questions.question: Under 3% packet loss, which two adaptive behaviors does the pipeline rely on?
options: Switching to a larger LLM and disabling TTS
Falling back to PSTN audio codecs
Holding partial transcripts and raising the VAD speech-gate threshold
Restarting the LiveKit room
questions.question_zh: 在 3% 丢包条件下,pipeline 依靠的两种自适应行为是?
options_zh: 切到更大的 LLM 并禁用 TTS
回退到 PSTN 音频编解码
保留 partial transcript 并提高 VAD speech-gate 阈值
重启 LiveKit 房间
